commits.subject: feat(menu): extract BurgerMenu.vue with a11y hardening + z-index scale
commits.body:
Extracted burger menu from AppLayout into standalone BurgerMenu.vue with
all glow-props disclosure pattern fixes. Formalized z-index scale in
CLAUDE.md and normalized all components to match.

Burger Menu Hardening:
- Disclosure pattern: aria-expanded, aria-controls, <nav>+<ul>/<li>
  (not role="menu" — wrong ARIA semantics for navigation)
- Escape key handler (registered only while open)
- cursor-pointer on backdrop (iOS Safari empty div fix)
- overscroll-contain on dropdown (prevents scroll chaining)
- Focus management: first item on open, trigger on close
  (hasBeenOpen guard prevents focus steal on mount)
- focus-visible:ring-2 on items for keyboard navigation
- AppLayout simplified: items as computed data, BurgerMenu handles UX

Z-Index Scale (CLAUDE.md):
- Added scale table (0→80 range)
- Debug pill: z-[9999] → z-[80]
- Toast: z-[100] → z-[70]

CLAUDE.md Sync:

commits.subject: feat(theme): implement full dark mode system
commits.body:
User-controlled dark/light mode with system preference fallback,
localStorage persistence, cross-tab sync, and flash prevention.
Follows glow-props CLAUDE.md "Theme & Dark Mode" pattern adapted
to Vue 3 Composition API.

Foundation:
- Semantic CSS variable palette (:root light + .dark dark tokens)
- @custom-variant dark for Tailwind v4 class-based toggling
- color-scheme: dark on html.dark for native form inputs
- useDarkMode.ts composable (singleton, localStorage, matchMedia,
  cross-tab sync via storage event, dynamic meta theme-color)
- Flash prevention inline script in index.html <head>
- Dual <meta name="theme-color"> tags with media queries
- @media print overrides (no-print class, white bg, break-inside)

UI:
- Dark/Light mode toggle in burger menu with Sun/Moon icons
- dark: variants on 30 files (17 components + 8 views + CSS + HTML)
- ApexCharts theme-aware config (axis labels, grid, tooltip, legend)
- HelpDrawer prose styles use semantic CSS variables

commits.subject: fix(tags): suggestions and autocomplete not appearing in edit modal
commits.body:
Two bugs caused the tag input to appear completely dead:

1. ML confidence threshold was 0.5 — zero-shot classification on short
   transaction descriptions (e.g. "Pick n Pay") routinely scores 0.2-0.4
   for correct labels, so every suggestion was silently filtered out.
   Lowered to 0.15 and added debug logging when all suggestions are
   below threshold.

2. Autocomplete only searched tagCache, which is empty for demo
   workspaces and first sessions (tagCache is only populated on save).
   Now merges tagCache with a knownTags prop containing all tags from
   existing transactions in the workspace.

commits.subject: feat(engines): type-aware actuals splitting across all engines
commits.body:
Actuals are now classified as income or expense using the linked
expense type (actual.expenseId → expense.type) instead of blindly
treating all actuals as expenses. This prevents salary deposits from
inflating "actual spend" in cashflow, envelope, and variance engines.

- Cashflow: actualSpend → actualIncome/actualExpenses, effective net
  independently uses actuals where available
- Envelope: filters to expense-type actuals only for burn rate/depletion
- Variance: excludes income actuals from all expense comparisons; fixed
  variable ordering bug (expenseActuals used before definition)
- Matching: originalSign on ImportedRow, isTypeCompatible() prefers
  same-type matches (negative CSV amounts → income), fallback to any
- ImportStepMapping: preserves originalSign before Math.abs()
- Views: CashflowTab/CompareTab pass expenses to engines
- 92 tests across 7 files (was 86)

Complete implementation of all 7 phases of the budgy-ting product definition:

Phase 1 — Budget Management:
  - BudgetForm (create/edit), BudgetCreateView, BudgetEditView

Phase 2 — Expense Management:

Phase 3 — Projection Engine:
  - Pure TypeScript engine handling all 6 frequency types
  - Partial month and boundary clamping logic
  - ProjectedTab with by-item/by-category toggle

Phase 4 — Import Wizard:
  - CSV parser (RFC 4180), JSON parser, column auto-detection
  - 3-pass matching engine (exact, fuzzy, amount-only)
  - 4-step wizard: upload, map, review/approve, confirm

Phase 5 — Comparison Views:
  - Variance calculation engine
  - Line item, category, monthly views with CSS bar charts
  - Overspend/underspend colour coding with 5% tolerance

Phase 6 — Export/Import:
  - JSON export with comparison snapshot, browser download
  - Restore from backup (replace/merge), schema validation
  - Clear all data with confirmation

Phase 7 — PWA Polish:
  - usePWA composable (install prompt, SW update detection)
  - Install app button in header, update banner
